headline: Naftali Bennett נפתלי בנט on military: 89.6% Truthful
editorial:
Naftali Bennett might not have been on the podium for Trump's latest address, but his claims on military readiness are just as relevant. While Bennett asserts that "all reservists are fully mobilized and ready to take action against Hezbollah," our fact-checking confirms this claim as TRUE. This aligns with his strong record on military statements, including his accurate remarks on the role of combat engineers in Gaza and Lebanon.

Bennett's track record on military topics reveals a pattern of accuracy. Out of five recent claims, four were verified as TRUE, with only one marked as SOMEWHAT MISLEADING. That claim concerned the government's provision of troops to the IDF, where Bennett's statement didn't fully capture the complexity of the situation, despite IDF Chief of Staff Eyal Zamir's noted concerns.

With an impressive military topic score of 89.6, Bennett's overall truthfulness isn't too far behind at 78.5. He has made 133 claims, with 64 deemed true. While his misleading count is low at six, vigilance remains key. His statements on military matters show a clear pattern of reliability, especially pertinent as geopolitical tensions ripple from Trump's Iran address.

For the reader, Bennett's military claims are a rare beacon of precision in a sea of political rhetoric.
